evidence_excerpt: She was prescribed growth hormone with good response, and by 11 years 3 months her growth parameters were within mid-percentiles; however, mild cognitive delays persisted with overall intelligence in the low-average range.

quality_of_life.evidence_excerpt: Ongoing mild cognitive delays and hypertrophic scarring are noted; atrial septal defect never required intervention and growth improved with therapy.

timeline_events.evidence_excerpt: She was prescribed growth hormone with good response. At 11 years 3 months, weight 38.8 kg (55th centile), height 145.1 cm (45th centile), head circumference 52 cm (25th centile).

notes_on_uncertainty: The exact date of EP300 diagnosis via WES is not provided; first genetics specialist visit at age 9 is used as the reference. Some improvements (growth hormone initiation at age 8) predate the reference, but documented improved growth at 11 years occurred after the reference. Follow-up beyond age 11 is not available, and the causative nature of the EP300 variant is noted as somewhat speculative by authors.
